basic_details.job_title: Hansraj College Delhi University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Hansraj College is recruiting Guest Faculty in the Department of Philosophy. Walk-in Interview on 10 July 2026.

qualification.details: Essential Qualifications | As prescribed for regular Assistant Professor under UGC regulations. Minimum API Score of 55 marks for shortlisting as per University rules. | Other Conditions | Candidate should not hold any other teaching assignment. Must bring bio-data and all original documents/testimonials.

how_to_apply: Candidates must send their applications in the prescribed format along with self-attested photocopies of all relevant certificates/degrees to [email protected] latest by 09.07.2026.
On the day of interview, bring bio-data and all original documents.
Venue: Principal’s Office, Hansraj College, Malkaganj, Delhi-110007
important_instructions: Reporting time is 30 minutes prior to the interview. Latecomers will not be interviewed. No TA/DA will be paid. Any addendum/corrigendum will be published on the college website. Engagement is on guest faculty basis only.

content_sections.heading: Hansraj College Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Hansraj College, University of Delhi will conduct a walk-in interview for appointment of Guest Faculty in the Department of Philosophy. The notification includes complete details on qualifications, API score, interview schedule, and instructions. Candidates are strongly advised to read the full notice before applying. Download Hansraj College Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Hansraj College Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: Hansraj College is recruiting Guest Faculty in the Department of Philosophy. Walk-in Interview on 10 July 2026.

content_sections.heading: Hansraj College Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
Hansraj College Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Essential Qualifications As prescribed for regular Assistant Professor under UGC regulations. Minimum API Score of 55 marks for shortlisting as per University rules. Other Conditions Candidate should not hold any other teaching assignment. Must bring bio-data and all original documents/testimonials.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Hansraj College Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates must send their applications in the prescribed format along with self-attested photocopies of all relevant certificates/degrees to [email protected] latest by 09.07.2026. On the day of interview, bring bio-data and all original documents. Venue: Principal’s Office, Hansraj College, Malkaganj, Delhi-110007

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for Hansraj College Candidates
content_sections.text: Reporting time is 30 minutes prior to the interview. Latecomers will not be interviewed. No TA/DA will be paid. Any addendum/corrigendum will be published on the college website. Engagement is on guest faculty basis only.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Hansraj College Guest Faculty 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must send applications by 09 July 2026 to [email protected].

faq.question: Q2. When is the walk-in interview for Hansraj College Philosophy Guest Faculty?
faq.answer: The interview is scheduled on 10 July 2026 at 10:30 A.M.

faq.question: Q3. What are the qualifications required for Hansraj College Guest Faculty?
faq.answer: Same as UGC norms for regular Assistant Professor with minimum API Score of 55 marks.

faq.question: Q4. How to apply for Hansraj College Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Send application on prescribed format with documents to [email protected] by 09.07.2026 and attend the interview.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for Hansraj College Guest Faculty?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned.

faq.question: Q6. What documents are required for Hansraj College Guest Faculty Interview?
faq.answer: Bio-data, self-attested certificates, degrees, and all original documents for verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the venue for Hansraj College Walk-in Interview 2026?
faq.answer: Principal’s Office, Hansraj College, University of Delhi.

faq.question: Q8. Can a candidate with other teaching assignment apply for Hansraj College Guest Faculty?
faq.answer: No, the candidate should not hold any other teaching assignment.

faq.question: Q9. Is TA/DA provided for Hansraj College Guest Faculty Interview?
faq.answer: No TA/DA will be paid.

faq.question: Q10. Where to check updates for Hansraj College Philosophy Guest Faculty Recruitment?
faq.answer: Visit the official college website www.hansrajcollege.ac.in regularly for any corrigendum.
